data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Mart/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Mart_Text_XSpeedFirstStrik: Use X SPEED to add to a POKéMON's\nSPEED in battle.\pThat will help it get in the first\nstrike - a decided advantage!
data/maps/LavaridgeTown_Mart/text.inc.LavaridgeTown_Mart_Text_LocalSpecialtyOn: On MT. CHIMNEY's peak, there's a local\nspecialty that you can buy only there.\pGive it to a POKéMON - it will be elated.
